channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
item.description: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
item.description: Bitcoin snatched upside liquidity as the US trading session began, but traders warned over a failure to preserve BTC price gains.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Pudgy Penguins winds down Pudgy Party mobile game
item.description: Pudgy Penguins will halt development of Pudgy Party and focus on Pudgy World, as another Web3 gaming project shuts down after failing to find a sustainable business model.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Saylor’s Strategy buys 1,587 BTC for $100M, holdings hit 846.8K
item.description: Strategy acquired 1,587 Bitcoin for $100 million last week, lifting holdings to 846,842 BTC after raising $209 million through MSTR stock sales.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Tokenization could push DeFi assets to $2.7T by 2030: Standard Chartered
item.description: Standard Chartered forecasts assets locked in decentralized finance will reach $2.7 trillion by 2030, driven by tokenization and crypto-native growth.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Can BTC rebound to $69K as oil price plunges? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin gained bullish short-term BTC price targets with $69,000 on the radar thanks to the US-Iran peace deal, due to be signed in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Japan’s Bitbank cracks down on Polymarket-linked transfers
item.description: Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank warns users of possible account suspensions for Polymarket-linked transactions, citing Japan’s gambling laws.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Bitcoin nears $66K as Trump says US has peace deal with Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US and Iran have a deal for a “toll-free opening of the Strait of Hormuz,” sending Bitcoin to a two-week high.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: CFTC sues New Mexico over prediction market jurisdiction
item.description: New Mexico is the eighth state sued by the CFTC over prediction markets, as Gary Gensler doubted the regulators' claim of authority over sports event contracts.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Aztec Connect’s abandoned smart contract exploited for $2.1M
item.description: The Aztec Connect platform was deprecated in March 2023, but the immutable smart contract still held over $2 million in crypto assets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in 11th largest downward adjustment
item.description: Bitcoin mining difficulty has undergone its second-largest downward difficulty adjustment this year, following February’s 11% shift.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: StanChart looks for 3 signs of BTC bottom, including Strategy’s Monday news
item.description: Standard Chartered’s Geoff Kendrick tells clients “winter is over” as the analyst said crypto prices have likely seen the low for the cycle, ahead of Strategy’s Bitcoin purchase update.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Robert Lakin

item.title: Ethereum can quantum-proof accounts for just 7 cents, says Ethereum's Kohaku lead
item.description: The SPHINCS- proposal aims to reduce the cost of post-quantum signature verification on Ethereum while the network works toward a longer-term solution.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M loss tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
item.description: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
item.description: Bitcoin stayed near local highs on a new US-Iran peace deal pledge as analysis saw conditions favoring a sustained BTC price rebound.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
item.description: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models: Reports
item.description: Calls from Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and other tech firms prompted the Trump administration to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
item.description: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further “serious bugs” in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
item.description: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's “never sell” mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
item.description: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: ETH futures flash bearish signal, but stakers’ resilience points to underlying strength
item.description: Demand for ETH leverage remains low, but corporate accumulation and stakers’ dedication may prevent an Ether price crash to $1,500.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Anthropic suspends access to Fable 5, Mythos 5, citing US directive
item.description: Anthropic has abruptly disabled its flagship AI models after a US government directive citing national security concerns.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Major crypto exchanges cancel SpaceX IPO allocations, promising refunds
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX completed its landmark IPO on the Nasdaq on Friday, but crypto users seeking tokenized exposure to the IPO were left empty-handed after allocations fell through.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘calm top’ challenges most market bottom estimates: Research
item.description: New data from Galaxy Research suggests that Bitcoin's floor price may not drop as low as previous bear markets, but the bottom-finding process is still playing out.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Bitcoin rally to $70K builds as orderbook structure highlights traders’ confidence
item.description: A positive bid-ask readings and a bullish RSI divergence support Bitcoin's recovery, with $70,000 emerging as a key target.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
item.description: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
item.description: Tokenized RWAs surge despite crypto volatility, Kraken launches SpaceX IPO xStocks, prediction markets outpace onchain gambling and Sam Bankman-Fried seeks a Trump pardon.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
item.description: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai
